headline: WHEN TRUST RUNS OUT
subheading: How to remove a failing pharma supplier without breaking your supply chain or compliance
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury abstract editorial composition evoking the controlled removal of a pharmaceutical supplier from an approved network. A precise interconnected grid of glowing teal and cyan nodes against deep navy, where one node is severed and lifting away from the lattice, its connecting links fading and a faint red quarantine-hold glow marking the break. A descending sequence of stepped translucent glass tiers suggests an escalation ladder from monitoring to suspension to full disqualification, each tier catching soft cyan light. Frosted glass panels layered like an audit decision trail recede in shallow depth of field, with subtle green accent reflections and a calm, decisive, premium clinical mood. Crisp focus on the detaching node, soft bokeh elsewhere, professional lighting, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
